name: python3-arpy
title: python3-arpy
description:
library for accessing "ar" archives
arpy is a library for accessing the archive files and reading the
contents. It supports extended long filenames in both GNU and BSD
format. Right now it does not support the symbol tables, but can
ignore them gracefully.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-arpy because library for accessing "ar" archives.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-arpy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-arpy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-arpy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
